name: Hot
_comment: Loud / saturator master profile for users who want the older hot boot character. Volume 127 (+12 dB max with scale=2), Delay 72 (+2.4 dB), MakeUp 25 (~+12 dB), full-wet stronger compressor. Default is now the clean/gentle profile; this preset is intentionally louder. Pair with Master Drive on the COMP B page if more saturation is wanted.
